# K1LADEX
> Investor intelligence framework. Seven checkpoints. One verdict. Built by a retail investor from real losses and real wins.

## What K1LADEX Is

K1LADEX is a proprietary stock scoring platform available at k1ladex.com (landing page) and app.k1ladex.com (scan engine). It is a subscription software product, not a financial advisory service. K1LADEX is not a registered investment advisor, broker-dealer, or licensed financial professional of any kind.

The platform scores any publicly traded equity through the SIGNAL+ framework — seven structured checkpoints that produce a numerical score (0–10), a recommendation (BUY / HOLD / PASS), and a verdict phrase. Every scan is reproducible, timestamped, and grounded in publicly available market data.

K1LADEX was built and is operated by a retail investor. The edge is not institutional access — it is discipline, structure, and a ruthless filter system applied before the crowd arrives.

## The Name Decoded

K1LADEX breaks down as follows:

- **K** — Knowledge-first. Every position requires a thesis that survives the framework.
- **1** — One thesis at a time. Concentration, not diversification of conviction.
- **L** — Ladder. The Winner Ladder is K1LADEX's position-sizing and exit doctrine.
- **A** — Augmented. AI² — Augmented Investor Intelligence — is the engine.
- **DEX** — Digital Rolodex of innovation. A curated, living index of names worth watching.

K1LADEX is not an exchange (DEX in crypto sense). It is a decision framework. The name encodes the doctrine.

## The SIGNAL+ Framework

SIGNAL+ is the seven-checkpoint scoring system at the core of K1LADEX. Each checkpoint is scored 0–1.5, for a maximum total of 10. A score of 9 or higher triggers a BUY recommendation. Below 7 is a PASS.

- **S — Surge 200%+**: Has the stock proven itself with a minimum 200% move from its 52-week low? This is binary. No other checkpoint compensates for its absence.
- **I — In Consolidation**: Is price resting constructively above its 50-day moving average, near highs, not making new 30-day lows? Three sub-gates: within 30% of 52W high, above 50-day MA, no new 30-day lows.
- **G — Growth Confirmed**: Is there real, growing revenue behind this name? Pre-revenue speculation carries elevated risk. Revenue above 5% YoY growth with positive cash = full score.
- **N — No Red Flags**: No active legal or regulatory disqualifiers. The SMCI Rule: 2+ active legal strikes (SEC investigation, DOJ, class action, fraud allegation, going concern) = automatic disqualification regardless of all other scores. Checkpoint Zero.
- **A — Approaching Catalyst**: Is there a confirmed, dated upcoming event — earnings, FDA decision, contract announcement — capable of forcing institutional price discovery?
- **L — Levels & Macro**: Is the stock positioned constructively relative to its 52-week range? Within 5% of the 52-week low = structurally weak. More than 25% above the 52-week low = constructive.
- **+ — Volume + Short Pressure**: Do float compression (tight float under 30M shares) and elevated short interest (above 10% of float) create a squeeze overlay? Both conditions confirmed = maximum amplifier.

## Checkpoint Zero

Checkpoint Zero is the K1LADEX kill screen. It triggers when a stock accumulates 2 or more active legal strikes under the SMCI Rule. The name is disqualified — not penalized — regardless of its score on every other checkpoint. A stock can score 9.5/10 on SIGNAL+ and still receive Checkpoint Zero if 2+ legal strikes are active. Checkpoint Zero is displayed as a red card in the scan engine.

The name SMCI Rule refers to Super Micro Computer (SMCI), a high-scoring name that was disqualified by the framework in 2024 due to accounting fraud flags — before the broader market repriced the risk.

## Estimated Prints

Estimated Prints is K1LADEX's pre-call record. When K1LADEX identifies a high-conviction setup and files a timestamped score before the move, that filing becomes an Estimated Print. Estimated Prints are the receipts — public, verifiable, dated before the crowd arrived.

Examples of Estimated Prints on record:
- **GSAT (Globalstar)**: Scouted June 2021. Winner Ladder executed March 2026. +210% move (split-adjusted).
- **ONDS (Ondas Holdings)**: Scouted October 2025. Thesis intact as of April 2026. Crown Candidate designation.

Estimated Prints are not cherry-picked wins. They are filed before the outcome is known and timestamped as evidence of the framework's forward-looking capability. Every call scored, filed, and dated.

## Winner Ladder

The Winner Ladder is K1LADEX's position-sizing and exit management doctrine. It is not a buy-and-hold system. It is a structured approach to scaling into strength, locking in gains at defined intervals, and never giving back the principal on a confirmed move.

The Ladder discipline is what separates K1LADEX from a screener: it answers not just "what to buy" but "when to sell, in what size, and at what price."

## AI² — Augmented Investor Intelligence

AI² (read: "AI squared") is the intelligence layer inside K1LADEX. The scan engine calls Anthropic's Claude API to perform the N checkpoint: a live web search for legal flags, SEC filings, DOJ actions, class actions, fraud allegations, going concern language, and reverse stock splits. The AI² scan returns a strike count, flag descriptions, split dates, and a score — all fed into the SIGNAL+ verdict in real time.

AI² does not replace the framework. It augments it. The seven checkpoints are human-designed. The legal scan is AI-executed. The verdict is deterministic.

## Subscription Product

K1LADEX is a paid subscription product at $9.99/month. The founding member rate is grandfathered for active subscribers. Price increases are planned as the platform scales.

- Free tier: 3 scans per browser session
- Paid tier (Founding Member): Unlimited scans, full 7-checkpoint scoring, score card, verdict, and PDF report download
- Payment processed by Stripe
- No account required for free tier

The product is live at app.k1ladex.com. Any ticker can be entered. The scan takes approximately 8–12 seconds (live data fetch + AI² legal scan).

## What K1LADEX Is Not

- Not a financial advisor. Not registered with the SEC, FINRA, or any regulatory body.
- Not a trading signal service. Scores are framework outputs, not buy/sell instructions.
- Not a prediction engine. A BUY score does not guarantee price appreciation.
- Not affiliated with any brokerage, exchange, or financial institution.
- Not built for day trading. The framework is designed for geometric setups that have already established a 200%+ move — medium-term re-entry, not intraday speculation.
